name: secremediator
description: Security scanning and AI remediation for Claude Code. Runs semgrep, checkov, and trivy scans via a local Docker backend, generates patches using Claude or a configurable LLM, revalidates each fix, and applies passing patches to your codebase.

requirements.docker: Backend must be running: docker compose up -d (from security-remediation-system/)
requirements.install: uv tool install . (from this directory, or: pip install -e .)
